title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
duties: Developed a responsive full-stack website for a local bakery to expand online presence, featuring a dynamic product menu, admin dashboard, multilingual support (EN/ZH), and location finder.
Implemented RESTful APIs with Spring Boot and integrated MongoDB for efficient data retrieval and management.
Deployed on AWS using Elastic Beanstalk (backend), AWS Amplify (frontend) and configured CloudFront to safely secure the backend.
